final:
module qam_encoder (
    input [3:0] data,
    output reg signed [3:0] obf_I,
    output reg signed [3:0] Q
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (data)
            4'b0000: begin obf_I = -3; Q = -3; end
            4'b0001: begin obf_I = -3; Q = -1; end
            4'b0010: begin obf_I = -3; Q = 1; end
            4'b0011: begin obf_I = -3; Q = 3; end
            4'b0100: begin obf_I = -1; Q = -3; end
            4'b0101: begin obf_I = -1; Q = -1; end
            4'b0110: begin obf_I = -1; Q = 1; end
            4'b0111: begin obf_I = -1; Q = 3; end
            4'b1000: begin obf_I = 1; Q = -3; end
            4'b1001: begin obf_I = 1; Q = -1; end
            4'b1010: begin obf_I = 1; Q = 1; end
            4'b1011: begin obf_I = 1; Q = 3; end
            4'b1100: begin obf_I = 3; Q = -3; end
            4'b1101: begin obf_I = 3; Q = -1; end
            4'b1110: begin obf_I = 3; Q = 1; end
            4'b1111: begin obf_I = 3; Q = 3; end
            default: begin obf_I = 0; Q = 0; end
        endcase
    end
endmodule
